issues.title: Bug: Blank screen on desktop app launch — KanbanBoard infinite re-render via Zustand selector fresh references
Bug: Blank-screen regression v2 — App.tsx:152 passes fresh {} to useStaleWorkDetection → infinite re-render

note: Blank-screen hotfix release bundling two occurrences of the same React-19 fresh-reference bug class. #210 (terminalStore/kanbanStore selectors) fixed in 0a60e28. #212 (App.tsx hook arguments + nested ErrorBoundary) fixed in 8ed7037. Issue #211 (framework state-shim worktree resolution, commit b6fb2ff) is also on main but unrelated to the blank-screen bug class — included in the tag incidentally but not advertised in release notes for this release.
